ksa_text: Skill in designing compliance management frameworks and governance structures, including risk classification architectures, control definition, metrics and reporting mechanisms, and organizational accountability assignments.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to AI Risk and Ethics Specialist scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("risk classif", "accountabilit"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.
